allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); vulns=d.get\('vulnerabilities',{}\); [print\(f'{k}: {v[\\"severity\\"]} \({len\(v.get\(\\"via\\",[]\)\)} advisories\)'\) for k,v in vulns.items\(\)]")
